lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: What can I do for you, human?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: Can I help you with anything?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: Was there anything you wanted?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: What did you need of the White Chisel?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: Is there anything you need assistance with?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: And what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: I am the head secretary of the White Chisel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The what?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: The Brown Engine. We are one of the eight major mining companies, and one of the finest if I do say so myself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where am I?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: These are the offices of the Brown Engine.

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: This is the official residence of the Brown Engine.

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: Why, you are in the headquarters of the Brown Engine.

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: We share this floor of the palace with the other companies of the Consortium. And trade with them on the Trade Octagon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Trade Octagon?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: See those traders out there, just out the door? They're all standing in the Trade Octagon. There's an awful lot of trade going on in the palace, you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything else of interest in the palace?

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: You will have to find that out on your own, I'm afraid. I do have more work to do.

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: Goodbye, human.

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Brown Engine Secretary
lines.text: Okay.
